title: Massive Restaurants is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Massive Restaurants is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Massive Restaurants are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Massive Restaurants:
Massive Restaurants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
